text:
Excerpt from Steve Wills' poudriere build of science/clhep:

CMake Error at cmake/Modules/ClhepVariables.cmake:123 (message):
  c++11 extension is not available for /usr/local/libexec/ccache/c++

Full log can be found at:
http://poudriere.mouf.net/karl/poudriere/data/head-powerpc64-default/2016-09-07_19h36m10s/logs/errors/clhep-2.3.1.1.log
